Preflight.DistinctReqIdGuarantee: ReqId == _id verified on 1,000 sampled docs; _id is system-unique on all backends, so distinct ReqId == distinct _id == document count even where the ReqId index is non-unique.

ReuseCheck.Detail: tasks=88618 (successful=88618), created=88618, ready=88618, closed=88618, checkedOut=88618. No-reuse holds when created>=successfulTasks (one fresh connection per completed Task) and created≈closed (no leak). created<successfulTasks is reuse (suspectedReuseEvents=0); created<totalTasks here is 0 Tasks that failed at server-selection BEFORE opening a connection, not reuse. Per-Task pool check-outs (≈4×tasks) are normal within a Task.
